nasb.text: Now Saul and his son Jonathan and the people who were present with them were staying in Geba of Benjamin while the Philistines camped at Michmash.

esv.text: And Saul and Jonathan his son and the people who were present with them stayed in Geba of Benjamin, but the Philistines encamped in Michmash.

cnv.text: 掃羅和他的兒子約拿單，以及跟隨他們的人都停留在便雅憫的迦巴，非利士人卻在密抹安營。

ccb.text: 扫罗及其儿子约拿单和随从留在便雅悯境内的迦巴，非利士人则在密抹扎营。
